mapper.sql: appointId, coachId, appDate, appTime, appStatus, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into coach_appointment
appointId,
coachId,
appDate,
appTime,
appStatus,
createdDate,
#{appointId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{appDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{appTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{appStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update coach_appointment
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
appDate = #{appDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
appTime = #{appTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
appStatus = #{appStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where appointId = #{appointId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update coach_appointment set coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, appDate = #{appDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, appTime = #{appTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, appStatus = #{appStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where appointId = #{appointId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE coach_appointment SET appDate = #{appDate} where coachId = #{coachId} and appTime = #{appTime}
